zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh de Copley於1299年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾可普利時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Copley37歲，母親Winnifred de Mirfield32歲。他於1324年與Ann Cromwelbotham在英國英格蘭賀福爾布藍普頓 布萊恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1375年在他的家鄉享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Copley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Copley, for example in County Durham, Staffordshire, and Yorkshire, from the Old English personal name Coppa (apparently a byname for a tall man) or from copp ‘hilltop’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh de Copley was born in 1299, in Copley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas de Copley, was 37 and his mother, Winnifred de Mirfield, was 32. He married Ann Cromwelbotham in 1324, in Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1375, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh de Copley est né en 1299, à Copley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Copley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Winnifred de Mirfield, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Ann Cromwelbotham en 1324, à Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1375, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh de Copley 1299 in Copley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Copley 37 und seine Mutter Winnifred de Mirfield 32. Er hat 1324 in Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Ann Cromwelbotham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1375 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh de Copleyが1299年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコプリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Copleyは37歳，母Winnifred de Mirfieldは32歳であった。1324年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブランプトン ブリアンでAnn Cromwelbothamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1375年に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh de Copley(이)가 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 코플리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Copley(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Winnifred de Mirfield(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 브램프턴 브라이언에서 Ann Cromwelbotham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1375년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh de Copley родился в 1299 г. в местности копли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Copley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Winnifred de Mirfield, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Cromwelbotham в 1324 г. в местности брамптон брян, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1375 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.
